text.title: Contextual Inquiry Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Can the researcher observe in the user's actual environment?

conclusion.verdict: switch to diary studies or remote screen-share inquiry
use surveys / analytics; observation invalidates the data

example.trace: hospital ward access granted → on-site session → master-apprentice frame → themes from verbatim quotes

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
